submission_kind: 2-way blend, strong-permissive replacement (single member, no rank-avg)
rationale: Task 2 audit: rsf_longitudinal_summary alone has 5×10 m-s 0.7356, beating the 3-member permissive_ensemble_avg's 0.7197 by +0.016 — same magnitude as the re-weighting LB win. The two XGB-cox members are nearly identical (OOF rank-corr 0.97) and individually weaker (~0.69 m-s); the 3-way average dilutes the RSF's signal. Strict criterion (test corr vs landmark < 0.5) did NOT fire (rsf_longitudinal_summary has 0.548, just above the bar) but the m-s gap is too large to ignore — building this as a relaxed-criterion candidate.
